data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_1974BA: We don't need a kid around!\nGo on home already!
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_1974FF: I want to get a promotion so I can\nboss around the GRUNTS...
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_19753C: That submarine... It's tiny inside.\nI'm sore all over!
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_197589: That submarine we jacked, man, it's\nbrutal as a ride.\lIt's way too tight in there!
